name: Service Stream Limited
analysis: SSM's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 4% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$2.5600. Trade idea: entry A$2.5900, stop A$2.3760, target A$3.2320 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
